subject: Phase 2: Implement 9 synthesis engine organisms
description: 16_synthesis_engines.scd with PRIMA_MATERIA (subtractive), AZOTH (FM), QUINTESSENCE (additive), OUROBOROS (wavetable), CHRYSOPOEIA (PD), HOMUNCULUS (physical modeling), BUCHLAEUS (west coast), LOGOS (formant), TETRAMORPH (vector). All 7-stage organisms.
